revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月20日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 20일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月二十]][[zh:四月二十]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 20|qq=April 20}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月二十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 20일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 20''' is the 20th day of month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}} . == Events == * {{ill|Enchō|en|Enchō|qid=Q1327274|lt=Enchō (era)|1=Enchō}} 1 (Intercalary {{ill|April|en|April|qid=Q118|lt=April|1=April}} ) ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|923|en|923|qid=Q30108|lt=923|1=923}} {{ill|June 7|en|June 7|qid=Q2616|lt=June 7|1=June 7}} ) – {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q382005}} , who had been demoted to {{ill|Dazai Gon no Sochi|ja|大宰権帥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dazai Gon no Sochi|1=Dazai-no-gon-no-sochi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9891637}} , is posthumously restored to the Rank of Minister of the Right ({{ill|Minister of the Right|en|Minister of the Right|qid=Q1351174|lt=Udaijin|1=Minister of the Right}} ) and awarded the senior second Rank ({{ill|Shō ni-i|ja|正二位|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō ni-i|1=Senior Second Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11123277}} ). * {{ill|Heiji|en|Heiji|qid=Q1193930|lt=Heiji (era)|1=Heiji}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1159|en|1159|qid=Q19659|lt=1159|1=1159}} {{ill|May 9|en|May 9|qid=Q2556|lt=May 9|1=May 9}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Hōgen (era)|en|Hōgen (era)|qid=Q1193898|lt=Hōgen (era)|1=Hōgen (era)}} to Heiji due to the ascension of {{ill|Emperor Nijō|en|Emperor Nijō|qid=Q440149|lt=Emperor Nijō|1=Emperor Nijō}} . * {{ill|Jōkyū|en|Jōkyū|qid=Q1195428|lt=Jōkyū (era)|1=Jōkyū}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1221|en|1221|qid=Q5393|lt=1221|1=1221}} {{ill|May 13|en|May 13|qid=Q2560|lt=May 13|1=May 13}} ) – The 85th emperor, {{ill|Emperor Chūkyō|en|Emperor Chūkyō|qid=Q357253|lt=Emperor Chūkyō|1=Emperor Chūkyō}} , ascends the throne. * {{ill|Karoku|en|Karoku|qid=Q1194421|lt=Karoku (era)|1=Karoku}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1225|en|1225|qid=Q5403|lt=1225|1=1225}} {{ill|May 28|en|May 28|qid=Q2588|lt=May 28|1=May 28}} ) – The era name changes from {{ill|Gennin|en|Gennin|qid=Q1194430|lt=Gennin (era)|1=Gennin}} to Karoku. * {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|qid=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun (era)|1=Tenbun}} 15 (Julian {{ill|1546|en|1546|qid=Q6533|lt=1546|1=1546}} {{ill|May 19|en|May 19|qid=Q2578|lt=May 19|1=May 19}} ) – The {{ill|Siege of Kawagoe Castle|en|Siege of Kawagoe Castle|qid=Q1064720|lt=Siege of Kawagoe Castle|1=Siege of Kawagoe Castle}} , also known as the Kawagoe Night Battle, takes place. == Births == * {{ill|Eiji (era)|en|Eiji (era)|qid=Q1194167|lt=Eiji (era)|1=Eiji (era)}} 1 (Julian {{ill|1141|en|1141|qid=Q19613|lt=1141|1=1141}} {{ill|May 27|en|May 27|qid=Q2587|lt=May 27|1=May 27}} ) – {{ill|Eisai|en|Eisai|qid=Q366128|lt=Eisai|1=Eisai}} , founder of the Japanese {{ill|Rinzai school|en|Rinzai school|qid=Q639625|lt=Rinzai school|1=Rinzai school}} of Zen Buddhism (+ {{ill|1215|en|1215|qid=Q5366|lt=1215|1=1215}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei (era)|1=Ansei}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1855|en|1855|qid=Q7673|lt=1855|1=1855}} {{ill|June 4|en|June 4|qid=Q2627|lt=June 4|1=June 4}} ) – {{ill|Inukai Tsuyoshi|en|Inukai Tsuyoshi|qid=Q354687|lt=Inukai Tsuyoshi|1=Inukai Tsuyoshi}} , 29th {{ill|Prime Minister of Japan|1=Prime Minister of Japan|2=ja|3=内閣総理大臣|ja|Prime Minister of Japan|1=Prime Minister of Japan|2=ja|3=内閣総理大臣|1=Prime Minister of Japan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prime Minister of Japan|13=User:Immanuelle/Prime Minister of Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q274948}} (+ {{ill|1932|en|1932|qid=Q18743|lt=1932|1=1932}} ). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|May 26|en|May 26|qid=Q2586|lt=May 26|1=May 26}} ) – {{ill|Mikazuki Shakuko|ja|三角錫子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mikazuki Shakuko|1=Suzuko Misumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11357235}} , {{ill|educator|ja|Educator|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/educator|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ {{ill|1921|en|1921|qid=Q2162|lt=1921|1=1921}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Taixi (era)|ja|太熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taixi (era)|1=Taixi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q8012845}} 1 (Julian {{ill|290|en|290|qid=Q32320|lt=290|1=290}} {{ill|May 16|en|May 16|qid=Q2574|lt=May 16|1=May 16}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Wu of Jin|en|Emperor Wu of Jin|qid=Q7356|lt=Emperor Wu of Jin|1=Emperor Wu of Jin}} (武帝), the founding emperor of the {{ill|Western Jin|ja|西晋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Western Jin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Western Jin Dynasty|qid=Q1145470}} dynasty (* {{ill|237|en|237|qid=Q30750|lt=237|1=237}} ). * {{ill|Kōji (era)|ja|Kōji (日本)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōji (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2 (Julian {{ill|1556|en|1556|qid=Q6590|lt=1556|1=1556}} {{ill|May 28|en|May 28|qid=Q2588|lt=May 28|1=May 28}} ) – {{ill|Saitō Dōsan|en|Saitō Dōsan|qid=Q1202670|lt=Saitō Dōsan|1=Saitō Dōsan}} , samurai warlord (* {{ill|1494|en|1494|qid=Q6693|lt=1494|1=1494}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|1591|en|1591|qid=Q6766|lt=1591|1=1591}} {{ill|June 11|en|June 11|qid=Q2617|lt=June 11|1=June 11}} ) – {{ill|Tsuda Sōgyū|en|Tsuda Sōgyū|qid=Q7849927|lt=Tsuda Sōkyū|1=Tsuda Sōgyū}} , renowned {{ill|tea master|ja|茶人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/tea master|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 茶人人物一覧|1=list of Tea masters|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11617948}} . * {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|qid=Q1146135|lt=Keian (era)|1=Keian}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1651|en|1651|qid=Q6956|lt=1651|1=1651}} {{ill|June 8|en|June 8|qid=Q2621|lt=June 8|1=June 8}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|en|Tokugawa Iemitsu|qid=Q314481|lt=Tokugawa Iemitsu|1=Tokugawa Iemitsu}} , 3rd {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* {{ill|1604|en|1604|qid=Q6738|lt=1604|1=1604}} ).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|19|4|21|3|20|5|4|0420|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
